name: Omitted Break Statement in Switch
description: The program omits a break statement within a switch case, causing execution to fall through to subsequent cases. This leads to unintended code execution where logic from multiple case branches runs when only one was intended.
detection_pattern: CONTROL node (switch/case) where a case branch lacks a terminating break or return. Look for CONTROL(switch)→STRUCTURAL(case) paths that fall through to the next STRUCTURAL(case) without an explicit CONTROL(break).
